brand.name: Blind Democracy
brand.tagline: Vote honestly based on what politicians actually do
hero.title1: Choose the policy first. See the party after.
hero.text1: No logos, colours or faces. Only the content counts.
hero.text2: Compare election promises with actual voting behaviour.
hero.title3: Where do parties break their promises?
hero.text3: Discover which parties vote differently from what they promised voters.
hero.text4: Every claim comes with sources, evidence levels and impact analysis.
topics.title: Topics
topics.intro: Open a topic and explore the underlying data.
topics.description: Each topic brings together party positions, parliament voting data, evidence claims, impact and sources.
topics.positionsDisclaimer: Party positions are sourced from Dutch election manifestos and are shown in their original language.
reliability.title: Reliability per party
reliability.intro: Scores only show what is currently measurable. Missing components remain visible as open data points, so the meter never suggests more certainty than the data allows.
reliability.membersIntro: We show what we can already verify — and what we cannot yet.
reliability.votingKnown: We know how this party usually votes
reliability.votingUnknown: We do not yet know how this party votes
reliability.positionsUnknown: We do not yet know all key positions
reliability.promisesKnown: We can see whether promises are kept
reliability.promisesUnknown: We do not yet know whether promises are kept
reliability.claimsUnknown: We do not yet know whether statements are accurate
reliability.members: MPs from Dutch Parliament Open Data
liedetector.title: Promise vs voting behaviour
liedetector.intro: Which parties and politicians vote differently from what they promised?
footer.tagline: Making honest choices based on what politicians actually do.
footer.independent: Independent · No political funding · No advertisements
error.title: Something went wrong
error.body: Refresh the page. If the problem persists, please contact us.
